name: SubscriptionAnalyticsAggregator

neutralConcepts: Both SubscriptionActivated (add) AND SubscriptionCancelled (subtract) handlers required — additive-only = score-0. CF-12-3.
normalizeMrr() is MACHINE: MONTHLY=priceCents, ANNUAL=Math.floor(priceCents/12), CUSTOM=Math.floor(priceCents/intervalDays*30). CF-12-3.
SubscriptionMetricsUpdated output has NO subscriberId field — tenant-level aggregates only
IProrationService (F211) is SHARED — not re-registered in T212

ironRules.rule: Both SubscriptionActivated AND SubscriptionCancelled handlers required — additive-only aggregation = score-0. CF-12-3.
normalizeMrr() is MACHINE: ANNUAL=Math.floor(priceCents/12), CUSTOM=Math.floor(priceCents/intervalDays*30). Not configurable. CF-12-3.
SubscriptionMetricsUpdated has NO subscriberId field — tenant-level aggregates only.
IProrationService (F211) is SHARED — not re-registered in this service.

keywords: subscription analytics aggregator MRR additive subtractive dual handler SubscriptionCancelled normalizeMrr ANNUAL CUSTOM formula no subscriberId
